Interface Collation.ComparisonLevel

All Known Implementing Classes:
Collation.PrimaryICUComparisonLevel, Collation.SecondaryICUComparisonLevel, Collation.TertiaryICUComparisonLevel
Enclosing class:
Collation
public static interface Collation.ComparisonLevel
Abstraction for the ICU Comparison Levels.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch, Jens Schauder

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Optional<Collation.CaseFirst>
    getCaseFirst()
     
    default Optional<Boolean>
    getCaseLevel()
     
    int
    getLevel()
     
    static Collation.ComparisonLevel
    identical()
    Identical Level.
    static Collation.PrimaryICUComparisonLevel
    primary()
    Primary level of comparison.
    static Collation.ComparisonLevel
    quaternary()
    Quaternary Level.

    secondary()
    Secondary level of comparison.
    static Collation.TertiaryICUComparisonLevel
    tertiary()
    Tertiary level of comparison.

  • Method Details

    • primary

      static Collation.PrimaryICUComparisonLevel primary()
      Primary level of comparison. Collation performs comparisons of the base characters only, ignoring other differences such as diacritics and case.
      The caseLevel can be set via Collation.PrimaryICUComparisonLevel.includeCase() and Collation.PrimaryICUComparisonLevel.excludeCase().
      Returns:
      new Collation.SecondaryICUComparisonLevel.

    • secondary

      static Collation.SecondaryICUComparisonLevel secondary()
      Secondary level of comparison. Collation performs comparisons up to secondary differences, such as diacritics.
      The caseLevel can be set via Collation.SecondaryICUComparisonLevel.includeCase() and Collation.SecondaryICUComparisonLevel.excludeCase().
      Returns:
      new Collation.SecondaryICUComparisonLevel.

    • tertiary

      static Collation.TertiaryICUComparisonLevel tertiary()
      Tertiary level of comparison. Collation performs comparisons up to tertiary differences, such as case and letter variants.
      The caseLevel cannot be set for Collation.ICUComparisonLevel above secondary.
      Returns:
      new Collation.ICUComparisonLevel.

    • quaternary

      static Collation.ComparisonLevel quaternary()
      Quaternary Level. Limited for specific use case to consider punctuation.
      The caseLevel cannot be set for Collation.ICUComparisonLevel above secondary.
      Returns:
      new Collation.ComparisonLevel.

    • identical

      static Collation.ComparisonLevel identical()
      Identical Level. Limited for specific use case of tie breaker.
      The caseLevel cannot be set for Collation.ICUComparisonLevel above secondary.
      Returns:
      new Collation.ComparisonLevel.

    • getLevel

      int getLevel()
      Returns:
      collation strength, 1 for primary, 2 for secondary and so on.

    • getCaseFirst

      default Optional<Collation.CaseFirst> getCaseFirst()

    • getCaseLevel

      default Optional<Boolean> getCaseLevel()
